name: reference-core
tagline: Documents Angular core's rendering, DI, and change-detection architecture so an agent orients before editing packages/core.
verdict: Safe, accurate reference doc with no security concerns. Gaps: no scope-exclusion guidance risking misfire on adjacent packages, a vague 'run tests via Bazel' step with no real command, and no version/changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for'/exclusion text anywhere, despite a sibling skill covering an adjacent package (packages/forms/signals) that this could be confused with.
No actual test command or pass/fail criteria given, only a vague pointer to Bazel.
No version field, changelog section, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
